generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - a group of foreign nationals were caught near our military base last week. Locals say they were taking photos and asking odd questions. Our allies aren't doing enough to secure their own borders, and it's putting us at risk. Time to demand they step up or we reconsider our commitments. #NationalSecurityFirst
